home.heroQuote: Behind every soldier stands a family whose only inheritance is the blood shed under the flag — the sign of the greatest love, the supreme sacrifice.
home.missionSubtitle: Turning a community concern into a lever for social, economic development and national cohesion.
home.missionBody: Founded in 2018, CFM analyses weaknesses in social and everyday life sectors affecting military dependents. Our studies lead to nationally significant conclusions, with advocacy before national and international bodies.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Receive our news and advocacy alerts.
home.liveSectionSubtitle: Follow our live streams and replays.

contact.title: Contact & help request
contact.subtitle: Contact CFM or submit a confidential help request. We commit to responding within 7 business days.
contact.generalSubtitle: For press, partnerships or any other inquiry.

engage.title: Get involved with CFM
engage.subtitle: Join our community: become a member, supporter or volunteer to defend military families' rights.
engage.memberSubtitle: Create an account to access your private space, link your family, sign petitions and track donations.
engage.donateSubtitle: Support our work via Mobile Money (Orange, M-Pesa, Airtel).
